parsed.production_notes: The video uses a split-screen format combining a human actor recording himself on a smartphone with a 3D animated AI avatar. The avatar has typical 3D animation characteristics like smooth skin and stylized features.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, light complexion, short dark hair, dark beard.
characters.demeanor: Relaxed, lying down, slightly hesitant but eager to learn.

characters.appearance: 3D animated young adult male, light complexion, curly dark hair, wearing black-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Purple and white floral short-sleeve shirt.

scenes.setting: Top: dimly lit room. Bottom: bedroom, lying on a pillow.

panels.panel_visual_description: A 3D animated young man with curly dark hair and glasses (Character B) is resting his chin on his hand, looking directly at the camera. He is wearing a purple and white floral shirt. The background is a dimly lit room with a warm, out-of-focus lamp. The framing is a close-up.

A young man with a beard (Character A) is lying down, resting his head on a blue and white patterned pillow. He is wearing a dark grey t-shirt. He is looking directly at the camera and speaking, occasionally using hand gestures. The background is a plain white wall with a black tripod stand partially visible. The framing is a close-up.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen video. The top half shows a 3D animated male avatar acting as a language tutor. The bottom half shows a real human male lying down, practicing his Spanish. The two characters appear to be having a real-time video call.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Yo llamo Gustavo. [I call Gustavo.]
Character B says: ¿Quieres decir "Me llamo Gustavo"? [Do you mean "My name is Gustavo"?]
Character A says: Perdón... pequeño español. [Sorry... small Spanish.]
Character B says: ¿Quieres decir "Perdón, hablo un poco de español"? [Do you mean "Sorry, I speak a little Spanish"?]
Character A says: Sí. [Yes.]
Character B says: Está bien. ¿Cuántas veces has hablado español en los últimos meses? [It's okay. How many times have you spoken Spanish in the last few months?]
Character A says: En realidad, no lo he hecho. [Actually, I haven't.]
Character B says: Estás en el lugar correcto. Hablaremos juntos todos los días y te volverás fluido en muy poco tiempo. [You are in the right place. We will speak together every day and you will become fluent in very little time.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
🇪🇸 🇪🇸 🇪🇸 🇪🇸 🇪🇸
Yo llamo Gustavo.

Perdón... pequeño español.

Sí.
Está bien. ¿Cuántas veces has hablado español en los últimos meses?
En realidad, no lo he hecho.
Estás en el lugar correcto. Hablaremos juntos todos los días y te volverás fluido en muy poco tiempo.

scenes.visual_description: A solid white screen displaying the app's logo and name in the center. Below the logo are badges for the Google Play Store and Apple App Store.
